optionsDescription: Choose how many IDs to generate, how long they should be, and which alphabet to use.
customAlphabetPlaceholder: Nhập bộ ký tự tùy chỉnh...
alphabetTooShort: Alphabet must contain at least 2 unique characters.

resultsDescription: Fresh NanoIDs are generated in your browser as soon as the options change.
resultsPlaceholder: NanoID tạo ra sẽ hiển thị ở đây...
